summary: Excellent performance highlighted by a rare "I Fought the Law (and the Law Won)" and overall fabulous vibe; recording quality not specified but presumed solid.
review: The concert is praised for delivering an unforgettable rendition of the seldom‑played “I Fought the Law (and the Law Won)” along with numerous other delights that left the reviewer ecstatic. While no explicit comments on the audio source are given, the five‑star rating suggests the recording is at least listenable and captures the show’s energy well.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single glowing review (5 stars) focusing on the musical performance; no data on recording quality, so rating leans heavily on show enthusiasm.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about soundboard or audience source; presumed satisfactory given overall positive impression.
